title: Origins: Frostweaver
description: An ice magic themed Origin for the Origins mod. The Frostweaver channels ice magic through a frozen artifact embedded in their body, using it as a source of mana.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/v-7znW2tmGY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod and requires Eggolib.**

**Frostweaver:** The Frostweaver channels ice magic through a frozen artifact embedded in their body, using it as a source of mana. They have become a living vessel of winter’s wrath, bound to the cold they command, they walk a fragile line between life and death, forever altered by the magic they wield.

**Impact:** 🔴🔴🔴

**🟩 Spellweaver's Craft [Primary]:** Invoke eldritch magic with a flick of your hand, casting spells to reshape the world around you.

**🟩 Arcane Grimoire [Secondary]:** Open the forbidden pages of your spellbook, unleashing knowledge that twists the fabric of reality.

**🟢 Arctic Agility:** The Frostweaver moves with unnatural swiftness across ice, snow, and powdered snow, their steps as sure as a predator’s tread.

**🟢 Aurora's Eye:** The swirling blizzards and endless nights hold no mystery for you, as the auroras guide your vision through the bleakest of storms.

**🟢 Cold Resilience:** The freezing bite of powdered snow has no hold over you, for your blood runs colder.

**🟢 Frozen Heart:** Mobs that strike the Frostweaver are chilled to their very core, their movements slow and heavy with the cold.

**🟢 Iceborne Climber:** The Frostweaver scales frozen walls with ease, their hands and feet finding traction where others would slip.

**🟡 Cryo Engine:** Your heart has been replaced by a powerful frozen artifact, chilling your blood and filling you with arcane energy. But be warned, if your mana is not spent quickly enough, your very body will begin to freeze in turn. The colder the land, the faster the frost claims you.

**🟡 Frigid Aura:** As your mana swells and your blood freezes, your body becomes increasingly touched by the cold. The deeper the freeze, the more your skin turns a chilling shade of blue.

**🔴 Cold-Bound Hunger:** In lands untouched by snow, your hunger gnaws at you faster. The food of the winter’s grasp replenishes you better, its chill sinking comfortably into your stomach.

**🔴 Fire's Wrath:** Flames and heat are your mortal enemies, burning you with brutal force. Fire and lava deal far more damage to your frostbitten flesh.

**🔴 Frostworn Flesh:** The Frostweaver’s body is frail, their form more suited to the ice than to battle. Their constitution is reduced, leaving them with less health than those of warmer blood.

**🔴 Solar Curse:** The heat of the sun saps your strength, leaving you weakened and slow when you wander into lands under the sun’s grace.

<details>
<summary>📖 Arcane Grimoire Spells 📖</summary>

### Arctic Aegis

- **Icon:** Ice

- **Mana Cost:** 5 MP

- **Description:** Draw upon the raw essence of winter to bolster your vitality. For a short time, you are shielded by the power of ice, gaining increased health and resilience.

### Arctic Vitality

- **Icon:** Packed Ice

- **Mana Cost:** 3 MP

- **Description:** Channel the frost within to mend your wounds, drawing strength from the icy essence around you. The cold becomes a source of healing, restoring your vitality and resilience.

### Frostbound Dash

- **Icon:** Powder Snow Bucket

- **Mana Cost:** 3 MP

- **Description:** Propel yourself forward in a blur of freezing wind, leaving a frosty trail in your wake. Enemies who dare follow are slowed by the creeping chill.

### Frost Nova

- **Icon:** Snow Block

- **Mana Cost:** 4 MP

- **Description:** A pulse of raw frost energy explodes from you, freezing everything nearby in its icy grasp. Foes caught in the blast are slowed to a crawl.

### Hailstorm Barrage

- **Icon:** Snowball

- **Mana Cost:** 6 MP

- **Description:** Call down a relentless storm of razor-sharp icicles over a targeted area. The shards pierce flesh and chill the ground, creating a deadly frost trap for those who linger too long.

### Icy Lance

- **Icon:** Packed Ice

- **Mana Cost:** 2 MP

- **Description:** Summon a jagged spike of ice that launches forward, impaling foes and chilling their blood. The freezing energy briefly saps their strength and binds them to the cold.

### Snowfall Descent

- **Icon:** Snowball

- **Mana Cost:** 2 MP

- **Description:** Envelop yourself in a swirling aura of snowflakes, lightening your fall and protecting you from harm.

### Snow Veil

- **Icon:** Snow

- **Mana Cost:** 2 MP

- **Description:** Cloak yourself in snow and shadow, becoming partially invisible. Perfect for striking unseen or vanishing into the blizzard.

### Whispering Wind

- **Icon:** Snow Block

- **Mana Cost:** 4 MP

- **Description:** Unleash a swirling blast of icy wind that lifts nearby enemies into the air, disorienting them and leaving them vulnerable.

</details>
